highlights.title: Fine-tune video and image models at scale with NVIDIA NeMo Automodel and 🤗 Diffusers
highlights.summary: NVIDIA NeMo Automodel and Diffusers fine-tune video and image models
highlights.detail: This allows for large-scale model fine-tuning, enabling more accurate and efficient AI models. The integration of NeMo Automodel and Diffusers provides a powerful tool for AI researchers and developers.

highlights.title: A scorecard for the AI age
highlights.summary: OpenAI introduces AI scorecard with Sarah Friar
highlights.detail: The scorecard measures ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute, providing a practical framework for evaluating AI systems. This scorecard can help organizations optimize their AI investments.

highlights.title: Adaptix-Framework/AdaptixC2
highlights.summary: AdaptixC2 is a modular redteam toolkit
highlights.detail: AdaptixC2 provides a highly modular and advanced framework for red teaming, enabling users to simulate and test various attack scenarios. Its modular design facilitates customization and extension.

highlights.title: Security updates for Friday
highlights.summary: Security updates issued for multiple Linux distributions
highlights.detail: The updates address various security vulnerabilities in packages such as cifs-utils, libreoffice, and kernel. Users are advised to apply these updates to ensure the security and integrity of their systems.

highlights.title: Building an Arch Linux aarch64 port for Holo Core (Collabora blog)
highlights.summary: Collabora publishes Arch Linux aarch64 port for Holo Core
highlights.detail: The port enables the use of Arch Linux on Valve's 64-bit Arm Steam Frame gaming system. Collabora has released the sources, binary packages, and a container image for aarch64 devices, facilitating further development and testing.

items.title: Fine-tune video and image models at scale with NVIDIA NeMo Automodel and 🤗 Diffusers
items.summary: NVIDIA NeMo Automodel and Diffusers fine-tune video and image models
items.detail: This allows for large-scale model fine-tuning, enabling more accurate and efficient AI models. The integration of NeMo Automodel and Diffusers provides a powerful tool for AI researchers and developers.

items.title: A scorecard for the AI age
items.summary: OpenAI introduces AI scorecard with Sarah Friar
items.detail: The scorecard measures ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute, providing a practical framework for evaluating AI systems. This scorecard can help organizations optimize their AI investments.

items.title: Model: ATH-MaaS/OvisOCR2
items.detail: The OvisOCR2 model is an image-text-to-text model, which can be used for various applications such as text recognition and generation. Its popularity is evident from the high number of downloads and likes.

items.title: Model: AngelSlim/Hy3-GGUF
items.detail: The Hy3-GGUF model is a text-generation model, which can be used for tasks such as language translation and text summarization. Its high download count indicates its widespread adoption.

items.title: Model: GnLOLot/MiniCPM5-1B-Claude-Opus-Fable5-Thinking
items.detail: The MiniCPM5-1B-Claude-Opus-Fable5-Thinking model is a text-generation model, which can be used for various natural language processing tasks. Its relatively low download count may indicate a niche application.

items.title: Security updates for Friday
items.summary: Security updates issued for multiple Linux distributions
items.detail: The updates address various security vulnerabilities in packages such as cifs-utils, libreoffice, and kernel. Users are advised to apply these updates to ensure the security and integrity of their systems.

items.title: Building an Arch Linux aarch64 port for Holo Core (Collabora blog)
items.summary: Collabora publishes Arch Linux aarch64 port for Holo Core
items.detail: The port enables the use of Arch Linux on Valve's 64-bit Arm Steam Frame gaming system. Collabora has released the sources, binary packages, and a container image for aarch64 devices, facilitating further development and testing.

items.title: [$] Securing BPF LSMs against tampering
items.summary: Christian Brauner discusses BPF LSM security limitations
items.detail: Brauner proposes changes to improve the security of BPF programs used as Linux security modules, including preventing removal or tampering with private data. These changes can enhance the overall security of Linux systems.

items.title: Flex Filament Stuck To Your Build Platform? Reach For The Isopropanol
items.summary: Isopropanol helps with stuck 3D printing filament
items.detail: A common issue in 3D printing is filament sticking to the build platform. Using isopropanol can help resolve this problem, ensuring a smooth and successful printing process.

items.title: Hackaday Podcast Episode 378: C Coders, Ceramic Printers, and Shadow Archives
items.summary: Hackaday Podcast Episode 378 discusses C coders and ceramic printers
items.detail: The podcast covers various topics, including C coding, ceramic printing, and shadow archives. The discussion provides insights into the latest developments and trends in the maker community.

items.title: How Octopuses Hacked their Ribosome to Become Smart
items.detail: The unique evolution of the octopus' ribosome has contributed to its advanced nervous system and intelligence. This example of convergent evolution highlights the complex and fascinating processes that shape life on Earth.

items.title: Adaptix-Framework/AdaptixC2
items.summary: AdaptixC2 is a modular redteam toolkit
items.detail: AdaptixC2 provides a highly modular and advanced framework for red teaming, enabling users to simulate and test various attack scenarios. Its modular design facilitates customization and extension.

items.title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
items.summary: Code review graph tool released. Reduces context for AI coding tools.
items.detail: This tool builds a persistent map of the codebase, allowing AI coding tools to focus on what matters. It has been benchmarked for reviews and large-repo workflows.

items.title: zeek/zeek
items.detail: Zeek is a powerful framework that differs from typical IDS systems, providing a unique approach to network analysis.

items.title: 1jehuang/jcode
items.detail: The coding agent harness is designed to streamline coding workflows and provide a more efficient development experience.

items.title: 521xueweihan/HelloGitHub
items.detail: The platform aims to share interesting and entry-level open source projects on GitHub, making it easier for developers to discover new projects.

items.title: BruceDevices/firmware
items.detail: The firmware is designed for ESP32 devices and provides a unique set of features for predatory applications.
